summary: Added 'vibrant' palette mode to createSpatialGradient with a 4-stop gradient (deep blue #1b2a8a → purple #6a1bbf → magenta #d83a8a → orange #ff7a2a) stored in linear RGB via sRGB→linear conversion (gamma 2.2). Each stop receives small seeded perturbations (±10%) for per-session variation while staying within the vibrant family. Terrain heightfield system now defaults to vibrant mode. All 15 US-079 tests pass, full suite (2004 tests) passes, build succeeds.
